name: heading_ruby_hint

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.10 + §7.5 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-20] A heading whose title carries ruby quotes the ruby-STRIPPED target (○　両頭の蛇), while the source has ruby (両頭《りやうとう》の蛇《へび》). Per §7.5 the look-back is over the base text, so the target resolves ruby-stripped and the directive is a heading hint, not a generic annotation. The corpus's single largest forward-reference family. Offsets from the §3 byte model; serialize is the canonical explicit-ruby form (｜ inserted).

source: ○　両頭《りやうとう》の蛇《へび》［＃「○　両頭の蛇」は中見出し］

expected.html: ○　両頭(りやうとう)の蛇(へび)
expected.serialize: ○　｜両頭《りやうとう》の｜蛇《へび》［＃「○　両頭の蛇」は中見出し］
